name: 短剑（★） | 蓝钢
descriptionEn: Historically a focal point of contention and even regulation, this Italian-style stiletto switchblade knife features a spring-loaded blade that can be deployed almost instantly with the push of a release catch. It has been cold blued. This is the malbec of weapon design - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 作为历史上舆论乃至法规的讨论焦点，这把配备着弹簧加压刀刃的意大利短剑可以在按下开关的瞬间弹出到位。 这把武器已完全被染蓝。 堪称武器设计中的马尔贝克 - 军火商布兹
